lineage.Process: Clip pand_v Rekengrenzen C:\GISstresstesten\Panden1702\Pandenclip.shp #
RepairGeometry Pandenclip DELETE_NULL Esri
Clip Pandenclip Rekengrenzen C:\GISstresstesten\Panden1702\Run51702.gdb\KPI_Pand_Rekengrens #
AddField C:\GISstresstesten\Panden1702\Run51702.gdb\KPI_Pand_Rekengrens pandid Text # # 16 # NULLABLE NON_REQUIRED #
CalculateField C:\GISstresstesten\Panden1702\Run51702.gdb\KPI_Pand_Rekengrens pandid !identifica! Python # Text NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
AddField C:\GISstresstesten\Panden1702\Run51702.gdb\KPI_Pand_Rekengrens relhoogte "Short (16-bit integer)" # # # # NULLABLE NON_REQUIRED #
CalculateField C:\GISstresstesten\Panden1702\Run51702.gdb\KPI_Pand_Rekengrens relhoogte !relatieveh! Python # Text NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS

JoinField C:\GISstresstesten\Panden1702\Run51702.gdb\KPI_Pand_Rekengrens pandid C:\GISstresstesten\Panden1702\Run51702.gdb\Omtrek_Pand_Lines_Clip_OR pandid Exposed_Facade_All;Exposed_Facade_OR "Select transfer fields" # "Do not add indexes"

CalculateField C:\GISstresstesten\Panden1702\Run51702.gdb\KPI_Pand_Rekengrens Exposed_Facade_All updateValue( !Exposed_Facade_All! ) Python "def updateValue(value): if value == None: return '0' else: return value" Text NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS

CalculateField C:\GISstresstesten\Panden1702\Run51702.gdb\KPI_Pand_Rekengrens Exposed_Facade_OR updateValue( !Exposed_Facade_OR! ) Python "def updateValue(value): if value == None: return '0' else: return value" Text NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS

JoinField C:\GISstresstesten\Panden1702\Run51702.gdb\KPI_Pand_Rekengrens pandid C:\GISstresstesten\Panden1702\Run51702.gdb\Waterdieptekaart_dissolve pandid SUM_flooded_pixels;MAX_DEPTH2D;MEAN_DEPTH2D "Select transfer fields" # "Do not add indexes"
DeleteField C:\GISstresstesten\Panden1702\Run51702.gdb\KPI_Pand_Rekengrens SUM_Shape_Length;Oppervlakte;Oppervlakte_min;Oppervlakte_max "Delete Fields"
AddField C:\GISstresstesten\Panden1702\Run51702.gdb\KPI_Pand_Rekengrens A_procent_gevel_water "Float (32-bit floating point)" # # # # NULLABLE NON_REQUIRED #
AddField C:\GISstresstesten\Panden1702\Run51702.gdb\KPI_Pand_Rekengrens B_lengte_gevel_water "Float (32-bit floating point)" # # # # NULLABLE NON_REQUIRED #
AddField C:\GISstresstesten\Panden1702\Run51702.gdb\KPI_Pand_Rekengrens C_max_hoogte_gevel_water "Float (32-bit floating point)" # # # # NULLABLE NON_REQUIRED #
AddField C:\GISstresstesten\Panden1702\Run51702.gdb\KPI_Pand_Rekengrens Risicoscore "Float (32-bit floating point)" # # # # NULLABLE NON_REQUIRED #
AddField C:\GISstresstesten\Panden1702\Run51702.gdb\KPI_Pand_Rekengrens Risicoscore_cat Text # # # # NULLABLE NON_REQUIRED #

CalculateField C:\GISstresstesten\Panden1702\Run51702.gdb\KPI_Pand_Rekengrens A_procent_gevel_water classify_result(!SUM_flooded_pixels!, !Exposed_Facade_OR!) Python " def classify_result(A, B): if B == 0 or A == 0: # Avoid division by zero return 1 value = (A / B) * 100 if 0 < value <= 15: # om de grootte van panden mee te nemen in de risico inschatting. return 1 elif 15 < value <= 50: return 2 elif 50 < value <= 75: return 3 else: return 4 " Text NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
AddField C:\GISstresstesten\Panden1702\Run51702.gdb\KPI_Pand_Rekengrens relhoogte "Short (16-bit integer)" # # # # NULLABLE NON_REQUIRED #
CalculateField C:\GISstresstesten\Panden1702\Run51702.gdb\KPI_Pand_Rekengrens relhoogte !relatieveh! Python # Text NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CopyFeatures KPI_Pand_Rekengrens "D:\KPI_Panden\Februari aanpassing KPI panden\Februari aanpassing KPI panden.gdb\KPIPand_20022026" # # # #
CalculateField KPIPand_20022026 Risicoscore -99 Python # Text NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField KPIPand_20022026 Risicoscore_cat 'Buiten OR' Python # Text NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField KPIPand_20022026 Risicoscore -99 Python # Text NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS

ExportFeatures "D:\KPI_Panden\Februari aanpassing KPI panden\Februari aanpassing KPI panden.gdb\KPIPand_20022026" D:\RESULTATEN\BGT_Risico_70mm\BGT_Risicogevels_70mm_20260222.shp # NOT_USE_ALIAS "identifica "identifica" true true false 16 Text 0 0,First,#,D:\KPI_Panden\Februari aanpassing KPI panden\Februari aanpassing KPI panden.gdb\KPIPand_20022026,identifica,0,15;subtype "subtype" true attrdomv.udom: Sequential unique whole numbers that are automatically generated.

attr.attrdef: Area of feature in internal units squared.

attrdomv.udom: Positive real numbers that are automatically generated.
